## Description
Enable GitHub plugin integration for apme to allow seamless GitHub API interactions and workflow automation.

## Objectives
- [ ] Design GitHub plugin architecture for apme
- [ ] Implement core GitHub API integration
- [ ] Add authentication and credential management
- [ ] Develop plugin configuration and setup
- [ ] Add comprehensive documentation
- [ ] Implement testing and validation
- [ ] Deploy and release

## Implementation Plan

### Phase 1: Design & Planning
- [ ] Define plugin requirements and scope
- [ ] Document GitHub API endpoints needed
- [ ] Design authentication flow
- [ ] Create architecture documentation
- [ ] Review GitHub plugin best practices

### Phase 2: Core Implementation
- [ ] Set up plugin project structure
- [ ] Implement GitHub authentication (OAuth/PAT)
- [ ] Create GitHub API client wrapper
- [ ] Implement core GitHub operations:
  - [ ] Repository management
  - [ ] Issue and PR operations
  - [ ] Branch management
  - [ ] Workflow automation
- [ ] Add error handling and logging

### Phase 3: Configuration & Integration
- [ ] Create plugin configuration schema
- [ ] Implement credential management
- [ ] Add plugin registration and initialization
- [ ] Integrate with apme framework
- [ ] Test end-to-end workflows

### Phase 4: Testing & Validation
- [ ] Write unit tests
- [ ] Write integration tests
- [ ] Test authentication flows
- [ ] Performance testing
- [ ] Security review

### Phase 5: Documentation & Release
- [ ] Write plugin documentation
- [ ] Create setup and configuration guide
- [ ] Add usage examples
- [ ] Create API reference
- [ ] Tag release version

## Expected Outcomes
- Fully functional GitHub plugin for apme
- Complete documentation
- Test coverage
- Deployment guidelines

## Dependencies
- apme framework
- GitHub API access
- Authentication mechanism

## Success Criteria
- [ ] Plugin successfully authenticates with GitHub
- [ ] Core GitHub operations work correctly
- [ ] Documentation is complete and clear
- [ ] All tests pass
- [ ] Plugin is deployed and available
